title: We're in the Navy Now
writer: Monte Brice, John McDermott, George Marion Jr.
actors: Wallace Beery, Raymond Hatton, Chester Conklin
plot: "Stinky" Smith makes off with the prize money when his buddy, "Knockout" Hansen loses a fight with Percival "Sailor" Scruggs. Hansen pursues him him a U.S. Navt recruiting office, and, the next thing they know, both are in the Nav...
